# Peter H. Vartanian

> A personal repository of notes, experiments, and inquiry.

This site collects Peter H. Vartanian's CV, portfolio, working artifacts, and
contact information. Its recurring subjects include international security,
geo-legality, AI governance, open-source intelligence, and dual-use procurement.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://petervartanian.xyz/)
- [CV](https://petervartanian.xyz/cv/)
- [Portfolio](https://petervartanian.xyz/portfolio/)
- [(Working) Artifacts](https://petervartanian.xyz/artifacts)
- [Contact](https://petervartanian.xyz/contact/)

- [GitHub](https://github.com/petervartanian)

- [X](https://x.com/petervartanian)
